golden_royal.name: Golden Royal
golden_royal.description: 金屬質感、珍珠光澤、高對比巴洛克宮廷風
golden_royal.promptInjection: hammered gold textures, imperial pearl sheen, high-contrast baroque ornaments, warm amber rim lighting, velvet-deep shadows, specular gold highlights, crimson and ivory palette, jeweled embellishments
golden_royal.lighting: dramatic three-point lighting, warm golden rim light, strong specular reflections on metal
golden_royal.palette: deep crimson #8B0000, imperial gold #CFB53B, ivory pearl #F5F0E8, midnight navy #1B2A4A
golden_royal.materials: polished hammered gold, brushed brass, aged parchment, faceted precious gems, royal velvet

modern_neon.name: Modern Neon
modern_neon.description: 霓虹特效、高飽和藍/洋紅、賽博龐克感
modern_neon.promptInjection: electric neon glow, hyper-saturated cyan and magenta, cyberpunk chrome surfaces, bloom light leaks, laser scanline effects, holographic iridescence, dark carbon fiber background, neon tube reflections
modern_neon.lighting: neon backlight, bloom glow halos, rim-lit with electric blue and hot pink, volumetric laser beams
modern_neon.palette: electric cyan #00FFFF, hot magenta #FF00FF, deep void black #050510, chrome silver #C0C0D0
modern_neon.materials: brushed chrome, carbon fiber weave, liquid crystal, electro-luminescent panels, mirrored acrylic

ancient_myth.name: Ancient Myth
ancient_myth.description: 大理石/翡翠材質、符文雕刻、神話史詩感
ancient_myth.promptInjection: weathered marble veining, jade green translucency, ancient rune engravings, moss patina on stone, atmospheric god rays through mist, epic mythological grandeur, aged bronze oxidation, ethereal divine glow
ancient_myth.lighting: soft dramatic god rays, ambient cave glow, cool moonlight rim, subsurface scattering on jade and marble
ancient_myth.palette: imperial jade #00A86B, aged marble #E8E0D0, oxidized bronze #6B4F2A, mystic violet #4B0082
ancient_myth.materials: white Carrara marble with grey veins, translucent nephrite jade, oxidized bronze patina, rough-cut obsidian, etched stone runes

candy_delight.name: Candy Delight
candy_delight.description: 透明糖果質感、Q彈渲染、清爽甜美色調
candy_delight.promptInjection: translucent candy glass material, subsurface sugar scattering, jelly-soft 3D render, glossy pastel coating, rainbow caustic light, cheerful drop shadows, hard candy reflections, whipped cream textures
candy_delight.lighting: bright cheerful overcast lighting, rainbow caustics, soft pastel fill lights, specular hotspot on glossy candy surface
candy_delight.palette: bubblegum pink #FF69B4, mint green #98FF98, lemon yellow #FFF44F, sky blue #87CEEB, coral orange #FF7F50
candy_delight.materials: translucent hard candy (glass shader), soft silicone jelly, matte frosted sugar, shiny wrapped foil, whipped cream foam
